_comment: Dev-agent sandbox inventory for migration-story ACs. Authoritative list of CLIs the dev agent MAY assume on session PATH (dev_agent_available) vs. CLIs that MUST NOT appear in dev-agent ACs (dev_agent_forbidden). Forbidden CLIs belong in operator-gated ACs whose evidence is a one-time Completion-Notes paste. See feedback memory 'Verify via shipped deps, not operator CLIs' and project memory 'no Docker'. Updated when a new CLI class is adopted or rejected; requires party-mode for additions to dev_agent_available.

_changelog.2026-04-30: Story 7b.10 T1 resolved Dan as LLM-only via shared LLM facade; retired dev_agent_forbidden entry dan-api-tbd-pending without promotion.
_changelog.2026-04-29: Slab 7b Wave 0 foundational artifact (FR107 + NFR-CG12). Added 5 entries to dev_agent_forbidden for the 5 live API surfaces introduced by Slab 7b Class-C/C+/D body activations (gamma, kling, elevenlabs, wondercraft) plus dan-api-tbd-pending. Hard precondition for Wave 3 (API-bound Class-C stories) opens. Per NFR-CG17 + R7 amendment: this PR is operator-blessed for Codex parallel-authoring; in this case authored by Claude during Wave 0 atomic-merge per R1 party-mode scoping consensus (foundational-artifacts class lives pre-Wave-1, NOT inside Codex's Class-C/C+ port-shape scope).

dev_agent_forbidden.docker: Container runtime removed from the LangChain/LangGraph migration architecture on 2026-04-22. Postgres runs natively on operator's machine. docker/docker-compose must not appear in any dev-agent AC.
dev_agent_forbidden.psql: Postgres CLI is not assumed on the dev-agent session PATH. For dev-agent ACs, use psycopg (shipped in 1.1a lockfile) with a pytest that calls pytest.skip(...) when DATABASE_URL is unreachable. psql smoke belongs in an operator-gated AC whose evidence is pasted into Completion Notes once.
dev_agent_forbidden.pg_dump: Postgres CLI; same rule as psql.
dev_agent_forbidden.pg_restore: Postgres CLI; same rule as psql.
dev_agent_forbidden.pg_ctl: Postgres CLI; same rule as psql.
dev_agent_forbidden.pgbench: Postgres CLI; same rule as psql.
dev_agent_forbidden.aws: Cloud CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use boto3 (or equivalent Python SDK) for dev-agent ACs.
dev_agent_forbidden.gcloud: Cloud CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use google-cloud-* Python SDKs for dev-agent ACs.
dev_agent_forbidden.az: Cloud CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use azure-* Python SDKs for dev-agent ACs.
dev_agent_forbidden.gh: GitHub CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use PyGithub or plain git (which is available) for dev-agent ACs.
dev_agent_forbidden.kubectl: Kubernetes CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox and not in architecture scope (no multi-tenant / no remote deploy).
dev_agent_forbidden.redis-cli: Redis CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use redis-py for dev-agent ACs if Redis is ever adopted.
dev_agent_forbidden.mongo: Mongo CLI; not in dev-agent sandbox. Use pymongo if Mongo is ever adopted.
dev_agent_forbidden.mysql: MySQL CLI; Postgres is the architecture choice, but listed for completeness.
dev_agent_forbidden.curl: Network-side CLI with environment-dependent availability on Windows bash. For HTTP smoke in dev-agent ACs, use httpx/requests from Python (both resolvable via uv).
dev_agent_forbidden.gamma: Gamma slide-generation API. Live invocation NOT assumed on dev-agent session PATH (no `gamma` CLI in standard distribution). For dev-agent ACs, invoke via httpx + Gamma API client at `scripts/api_clients/gamma_client.py` with pytest.skip(...) when GAMMA_API_KEY not set. Live evidence belongs in operator-gated AC-*-B blocks per Slab 7a CLAUDE.md governance. Slab 7b Story 7b.6 (Gary port-shape) is primary consumer.
dev_agent_forbidden.kling: Kling motion-generation API. Live invocation NOT assumed on dev-agent session PATH. For dev-agent ACs, invoke via httpx + Kling API client at `scripts/api_clients/kling_client.py` (or equivalent under `app/specialists/kira/_clients/`) with pytest.skip(...) when KLING_API_KEY not set. Live evidence operator-gated. Slab 7b Story 7b.7 (Kira port-shape) is primary consumer.
dev_agent_forbidden.elevenlabs: ElevenLabs voice-synthesis API. Live invocation NOT assumed on dev-agent session PATH (no `elevenlabs` CLI in standard distribution). For dev-agent ACs, invoke via httpx + ElevenLabs SDK at `scripts/api_clients/elevenlabs_client.py` (or equivalent under `app/specialists/enrique/_clients/`) with pytest.skip(...) when ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not set. Live evidence operator-gated. Slab 7b Story 7b.8 (Enrique port-shape) is primary consumer.
dev_agent_forbidden.wondercraft: Wondercraft podcast-generation API. Live invocation NOT assumed on dev-agent session PATH. For dev-agent ACs, invoke via httpx + Wondercraft API client at `scripts/api_clients/wondercraft_client.py` (or equivalent under `app/specialists/wanda/_clients/`) with pytest.skip(...) when WONDERCRAFT_API_KEY not set. Live evidence operator-gated. Slab 7b Story 7b.9 (Wanda port-shape onto scaffold) is primary consumer.

flag_with_warning.ffmpeg: Primary repo uses ffmpeg via Python wrappers; availability on dev-agent PATH is not guaranteed. If a migration story invokes ffmpeg as a shell CLI in a dev-agent AC, flag for review — the AC probably belongs in operator-gated form or should invoke ffmpeg through a Python wrapper.
